title: DisableBats
description: Disallows bats from spawning naturally in the world.
body:
![Before & after of a swarm of bats.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/748c9c658bc1185fdfe46e0ffa775d3c33400ce1.png)

A simple Minecraft plugin that removes bats from your world for a cleaner, quieter experience.

# 📌 Features
- Prevents bats from spawning naturally.
- Removes existing bats automatically.
- Keeps your caves and builds free from annoying bat noises.


# 📦 Installation
1. Place the .jar file into your server's plugins folder.
2. Restart or reload your server.


# ⚙️ Configuration
No configuration required — plug and play.

# 🔗 Links
Need a custom plugin? Message me on Discord: https://discord.com/users/primimity
